This '''species''' were a race of thin [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Alien/Legends|aliens]] with [[Color/Legends|red]] skin and white facial stripes indigenous to [[Adin]]. Other distinctive features were their two-fingered [[Limb/Legends|hands]] and pale pink [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]]. [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Meido]] was a member of this species.

{{Species-stub}}
